q:
My father is at home usually between 9 p.m and 11 p.m.
(meaning of the underlined preposition)
options: Referring to two persons or things

q:
How many prepositions can you find in the list?
jump, by, what, Ravi, with, flower, she, rainbow, pool, over, hurrah, smiling, across, ground, through
______ the days that followed her operation, she spent a lot of time in bed.

Find out how many prepositions are there given below.
for, neither, by, nor, with, at, from, between, and, or

I will meet you at half past five.
Choose the correct description for this use of 'at':
______ the winter you can only use the road with a four-wheel drive vehicle.

How many prepositions can you find in the list?
because, and, an, of, the, since, house, by, wow, from, he, onto, it, into, hollow, in, play, on

Mary entered the room and smiled at me.
(meaning of the preposition 'at')
______ the moment she is busy with her work.

I won't help you with your studies from now on.
(meaning of the preposition 'from')
options: Start of a period of time

q: The students who have cleared English have been exempted ______ the retest.
Jack has made no progress ______ his studies.
______ a few minutes we will be arriving at Delhi Airport.
The man rewarded the girl ______ a watch for saving his child from drowning.
The assembly starts ______ 8:00 am every day.
